summary: Frontend regression of Attendance refactor iteration 2 (Context API + consolidated constants + API service migration). Logged in as admin, exercised all 5 tabs on /admin/attendance. End-to-end LanĂ§amento flow (schoolâ†’classâ†’loadâ†’mark Pâ†’saveâ†’success toast) works; vaccine status dots render via new vaccinesAPI.getStatusBatch; Registros/InformaĂ§Ăµes/RelatĂłrios/Alertas tabs all render with no errors. 0 console errors, Context API correctly provides state to all 5 lazy-loaded tabs.

test_results_by_feature.page_load: PASS - /admin/attendance loads, 5 tabs (LanĂ§amento/Registros/InformaĂ§Ăµes/RelatĂłrios/Alertas) render, 0 console errors, 0 pageerrors
test_results_by_feature.lancamento_e2e: PASS - ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADAâ†’2 ANOâ†’date 2026-04-17 (sexta)â†’Carregar FrequĂŞncia loads 1 student (ALUNO TESTE DUPLICIDADE), P button clickable (enabled on weekday), Salvar FrequĂŞncia returns 'sucesso' toast; Previstos/Registrados/Restantes summary cards populated (232/0/232 initially)
test_results_by_feature.vaccine_status_indicator: PASS - vaccinesAPI.getStatusBatch returns status for student id list; yellow dot 'bg-yellow-400' with title='Vacina pendente' rendered inline before student name
test_results_by_feature.registros_tab: PASS - Calendar + bimestre cards render (body text length 2081 chars); uses attendanceAPI.getDatesWithRecords + getBimestreSummary (migrated from inline fetch)
test_results_by_feature.informacoes_tab: PASS - Renders school/class selectors via useAttendance context; attendanceAPI.getClassStudentsInfo wired (empty state until class selected)
test_results_by_feature.relatorios_tab: PASS - Escola/Turma/Bimestre selectors + Ver na Tela + Gerar PDF buttons render; generateBimestrePdf uses attendanceAPI.getBimestrePdfBlob (migrated from inline axios.get)
test_results_by_feature.alertas_tab: PASS - Filtrar por Escola + Buscar Alertas; returned JOAO SANTOS 6Â° ANO A 64.3% (10 faltas) in table - matches expected seed
test_results_by_feature.tab_navigation_context_persistence: PASS - All 5 tabs navigated without 'useAttendance must be used inside' errors; Context.Provider wraps Suspense/tabs correctly; selectedSchool/Class state persists across tab switches

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor iteration 2 applied cleanly: VACCINE_API + API_URL removed from Attendance.js (verified); axios import removed; all previously inline fetch calls now go through attendanceAPI.getDatesWithRecords / getBimestreSummary / getClassStudentsInfo / getBimestrePdfBlob and vaccinesAPI.getStatusBatch.
AttendanceContext.Provider wraps all 5 lazy tabs and each *Tab.jsx consumes via useAttendance() - props drilling eliminated as intended.

Minor observation: AttendanceContext.Provider value object is recreated on every render (inline literal) which will cascade re-renders to all context consumers - consider useMemo for the provider value to minimize re-renders of lazy tabs (perf, not a bug).

Minor: Context hook throws when used outside Provider; InformacoesTab has its own infoSchool state wiring through context, which is fine but means the settings modal opens outside the Provider (it's a sibling) - not using context there either, so no issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor (Context API + consolidated constants + API service migration) is behaviorally identical to iteration_51. Admin login works, /admin/attendance renders all 5 tabs. Use weekday date (not Sun/Sat) on LanĂ§amento - P/F/J buttons are correctly disabled on weekends due to dateCheck.can_record=false. Turma 2 ANO under ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA has 1 student for quick smoke. Alertas seed: JOAO SANTOS 64.3% in 6Â° ANO A.
